name: TOP_PATENTS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: List top patents for one target pair with assignee and publication year.
cypher: MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, p.pub_no AS publication_id, coalesce(a.name,'Unknown') AS assignee, y.year AS year ORDER BY year DESC, publication_id LIMIT 20;
